message.content:
@startuml
participant Application
participant Node
participant Composed_VStack
participant VStack
participant State
participant NodeBuilder
participant "Control.Layer" as ControlLayer
participant Renderer

== 布局树构建过程 ==

Application -> Node: build
Node -> Composed_VStack: buildNode
Composed_VStack -> VStack: setupStateProperties
Composed_VStack -> NodeBuilder: setupEnvironmentProperties
Composed_VStack <- VStack: addNode

alt [LayoutRoot]
    Composed_VStack -> NodeBuilder: loadData
end

== 布局更新构建过程 ==

State <- ControlLayer: set
Application <- State: invalidateNode
Application <- Application: scheduleUpdate
Application <- Application: update
Application -> Node: update
Node -> NodeBuilder: updateNode
ControlLayer -> Renderer: invalidate
Application -> Renderer: update

@enduml
